name: S6_expr_ctrlflow_pack
description: Standalone runner with ten tests (expressions + control flow): arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, assignments, loops, goto, conditional, comma, else. Int‑only params. Returns bitmap of failing tests; 255/254 for no args/unknown name.
io_hint: Require exact registry matches; unknown names must return the designated 'unknown' status immediately. Parameters after : must not influence matching (no fuzzy/partial matches).
